title: Unseen viable slick choices
summary: Count next-lap fresh slick choices that are both finish-capable and not yet used by the driver in the race.
rationale: This combines the public-supported fresh-slick option family with the chronological slick-diversity family. It helps separate a stop that merely refreshes tyres from one that can also satisfy compound-variety pressure.
implementation_hint: Within each driver-race sequence, track current-or-prior slick compounds seen. For each row, compare viable next-lap fresh slicks against the seen set and add unseen viable count, softest unseen viable slick, and unseen-different-slick-can-finish flags.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Requires careful current/past chronology; do not mark future compounds as seen.
